name: Snake Wars
description: Embark on a slithery adventure in Snake Wars, the captivating io game that puts you in the scales of a charming serpent on a quest for growth. Devour tasty morsels to expand your size and reign supreme in the pit. Beware, for in this cutthroat world, only the largest survive, while the rest become fodder for their rivals. Navigate with skill and precision, dodging collisions with fellow serpents to ascend to victory in this exhilarating snake showdown! Website Developer <a href='https://www.julgames.com/'>https://www.julgames.com/</a>
instructions: Mouse Steer Left-Click Space Key Boost Mobile Controls Tap and drag
tags: .io, free games for your website, FreezeNova, Snake
